library(rtracklayer)

process_gff <- function(input_file, output_prefix) {
  # Import the GFF file
  gff_data <- import.gff(input_file)
  
  # Filter features with avg_posterior >= 0.5
  filtered_data <- gff_data[as.numeric(gff_data$avg_posterior) >= 0.5]
  
  # Export to GFF3
  export.gff3(filtered_data, paste0('output/', output_prefix, '_avgp0.5.gff'))
  
  # Set score and export to BED
  filter
